options.title: Life Sciences
courses: LIFESCI 7L - Introduction to Laboratory and Scientific Methodology

options.title: Mathematics
options.description: Students may select either Life Sciences 40 or Statistics 13.

options.title: Plan I—Research Immersion Laboratory
options.description: Complete the following five courses. Select either Chemistry 153B or Microbiology 132.

options.title: Foundation
courses: CHEM 153A - Biochemistry: Introduction to Structure, Enzymes, and Metabolism
CHEM 153B - Biochemistry: DNA, RNA, and Protein Synthesis

options.title: Focus Electives
courses: MIMG 106 - Molecular and Genetic Basis of Bacterial Infections
MIMG CM156 - Human Genetics and Genomics
MIMG CM256 - Human Genetics and Genomics

options.title: General Elective
courses: BIOENGR CM145 - Molecular Biotechnology for Engineers
CHEM M117 - Structure, Patterns, and Polyhedra
CHEM 153B - Biochemistry: DNA, RNA, and Protein Synthesis

PHYSCI 128 - Me, Myself, and Microbes: The Microbiome in Health and Disease
